ignite.alreadyPaidLink: Already paid? Book your session here →
ignite.heroTitle: Walk out with a one-sentence business
ignite.clarityLinkHero: Not sure yet? Take 20 min — a first read on your situation, free →
ignite.leaveWith1: A one-sentence business you recognize as yours
ignite.leaveWith4: A single landing page that holds it all
ignite.leaveWithDisclaimer: NOT a sales call for a "long-term coaching engagement." A 2-hour working session that produces a landing page for your business.
ignite.guarantee: If you don't leave with a one-sentence business you recognize as yours: you don't pay.
ignite.resonancePermission: If your heart isn't resonating with this, don't sign up. This works because people come when they're ready — not when they're pressured or manipulated.
ignite.clarityLinkFooter: Not sure yet? 20 min — a first read on your situation, free. →
ignite.faq1Q: What if I don't know my top talent yet?
ignite.faq1A: Everyone has one. You can't see yours because it's been YOU your whole life — too natural to notice. The session names what's already there and turns it into a one-sentence business people will actually pay for.
ignite.faq2Q: What if there's no actual business in what I do?
ignite.faq2A: Every top talent is monetizable — nature doesn't waste them. If yours exists, it's because it's useful, helpful, and valuable to other people. The only question is how it translates into something they'll pay for. The session names the three pieces (what you do, who pays for it, why) and pulls them into one sentence. If we don't find it in 2 hours, you don't pay.
ignite.methodologyVideoTitle: The Productize Yourself Session — Methodology Overview

hero.heading: Who will steward this?
hero.intro: Three vectors of work are ready for the light of day. I'm looking for bridges to heavy-lifters with resources, coherence, and clarity.

vector1.title: A Bitcoin-level discovery in AI
vector1.tagline: An unprecedented first-mover advantage. Open-source from day zero.
vector1.body: A scaffold that moves any frontier model up a developmental stage. In blind A/B testing: measurable cognitive uplift on the hardest questions. Axis 2 of AI progress — the field layer — opened and released as public infrastructure.

vector2.title: FMF + PMF guaranteed in 6–8 weeks
vector2.tagline: A system built for conscious aspiring impact founders.
vector2.body: Founder-Market Fit and Product-Market Fit, engineered from the founder's unique genius out — not from market research in. Guaranteed delivery window: 6 to 8 weeks. Live with paying founders.

vector3.title: The Golden Age's core of coherence
vector3.tagline: The integrating spine beneath the first two.
vector3.body: The ontological architecture that makes vectors 1 and 2 possible — and makes them fractal. A holonic operating system for planetary-scale activation. Publication forthcoming.

intros.transition: There is enough abundance here for everyone involved. We'll need to act together. Below: a shortlist of aligned heavy-lifters I've identified. If you can open a door to any of them — or know someone in their inner ring — reach out.

kenWilber.why: My ontological stack descends directly from AQAL, quadrants, holons, lines. Endorsement = category-defining. One step away via mutual contact.

danielSchmachtenberger.why: Meta-crisis, sensemaking, AI + civilization. Speaks to everyone worth speaking to. Knoware sits directly in his aperture.

jamieWheal.role: Founder, Flow Genome Project · author, Recapture the Rapture
jamieWheal.why: Culture-architecture for the meta-crisis. Network runs deep across psychedelic, performance, integral, and conscious-founder circles.

tomasBjorkman.role: Founder, Ekskäret Foundation · author, The Market Myth
tomasBjorkman.why: Swedish conscious-capital funder. Resources inner-development work quietly at scale. Direct match for resources + coherence + clarity.

peterMerry.role: Co-founder, Ubiquity University · Center for Human Emergence
peterMerry.why: European integral network. Noosphere work. Already in reference orbit.

charlesEisenstein.role: Author, Sacred Economics · The More Beautiful World Our Hearts Know Is Possible
charlesEisenstein.why: Gift-economy + interbeing. Millions of conscious readers. Philosophical match for open-blueprint / gravity-by-gift posture.

bayoAkomolafe.why: Post-activist philosopher. The exact frequency my tribe resonates with. Poetry + politics + ontology.

ottoScharmer.why: Institutional gravitas in conscious leadership. Field-sensing vocabulary aligns cleanly with the second-axis framing.

iainMcgilchrist.role: Author, The Master and His Emissary · The Matter With Things
iainMcgilchrist.why: Hemispheric theory. Scientifically grounds the masculine/feminine formulation of AI progress I arrived at.

johnVervaeke.role: Cognitive scientist, Toronto · Awakening from the Meaning Crisis
johnVervaeke.why: AI + cognition + meaning bridge. Growing Weaving Community network of conscious researchers.

tysonYunkaporta.why: Indigenous knowledge systems applied to modern sense-making. Matches the indigenous-cosmovision layer of my operating logic.

noraBateson.role: Warm Data Lab · International Bateson Institute
noraBateson.why: Systems thinking. Bridges many networks quietly. Transcontextual intelligence.

lynneTwist.role: Soul of Money Institute · co-founder, Pachamama Alliance
lynneTwist.why: Four decades of philanthropic bridge-making. Indigenous wisdom + conscious capital.

audreyTang.role: Former Digital Minister, Taiwan · co-author, Plurality
audreyTang.why: Distributed-protocol politics. Perfect philosophical match for open-source Knoware as public infrastructure.

zakStein.role: Education futures · Lectica · The Consilience Project
zakStein.why: Developmental psychology + AI + education. Direct Schmachtenberger orbit.

alnoorLadha.role: Culture Hack Labs · post-capitalist memetic engineering
alnoorLadha.why: Guerilla + spiritual + strategic. Match for the viral-vector half of fractal growth.

fosterGamble.why: Audience of millions of conscious seekers. Large-scale reach into the solution-seeking tribe.

emanuelKuntzelman.why: Consciousness evolution network with real distribution. Philanthropic + convening.

robertKirkpatrick.why: Data-for-humanity + institutional bridge. Different tier of network than most integralists — UN, multilaterals, policy-level.

glenWeyl.why: Tech + distributed governance + conscious-founder tribe overlap. Bridges AI labs and public-infrastructure movements.

cta.body: If you can make a warm intro to anyone above — or to someone who knows them — I'd be grateful for the bridge.

hero.headline: YOUR OLD LIFE IS COLLAPSING. YOUR GENIUS ISN'T.
hero.subheadlineBefore: For founders and visionaries stuck in the in-between — too awake to go back, not yet clear how to go forward — I help you design one Minimally Viable
hero.subheadlineAfter: Business that can actually pay your bills and honor your destiny.
hero.bullet1: Turn your soul work into one clear, sellable offer
hero.bullet2: Aim for a sane target (e.g. 5–10k/month on ~15–20 hours)
hero.bullet3: Stop scattering energy across 7 half-projects and build one true lane

isThisYou.heading: YOU'RE IN THE FORGE, NOT JUST IN A PIVOT
isThisYou.intro: You're not "just changing careers." You're standing between worlds:
isThisYou.bullet1: • The old way of working is dead or dying — your body and soul won't tolerate it anymore.
isThisYou.bullet2: • You're receiving real visions — land, projects, communities, products — but they mostly live in your head, voice notes, or ceremony.
isThisYou.bullet3: • Savings are melting, and your partner / family is shifting from "I support you" to "I'm scared."
isThisYou.bullet4: • You're highly capable (founder/leader energy), but right now your power is spread across too many ideas.
isThisYou.bullet5: • If someone asked, "So what exactly do you do?" — you'd hesitate or give three different answers.
isThisYou.closer: If this feels uncomfortably accurate, this work is for you.

promise.heading: WHAT WE BUILD: A MINIMALLY VIABLE GENIUS BUSINESS
promise.p1: I don't help you "find your purpose." You already hear it — that's why the old world hurts so much.
promise.p2: What I do is help you turn that loud inner knowing into one simple, grounded business model that:
promise.bullet1: • Is built around your true genius, not a trendy niche
promise.bullet2: • Speaks to a real, conscious pain in people you deeply understand
promise.bullet3: • Lives in a doable container (usually 1:1 or small-group deep work)
promise.bullet4: • Has realistic potential to generate thousands per month without burning you out
promise.closer: Think of it as Destiny, implemented: not as a fantasy, but as a business.

method.heading: THE EXCALIBUR METHOD
method.subheading: We don't manifest. We get radically honest, then build.

step1.title: NAME THE TRUTH
step1.body: We start with a real look at your life: projects, money, responsibilities, energy, partner dynamics. You keep what feeds you. We're not here to blow up your life — we're here to give your genius a viable lane.

step2.title: MAP YOUR GENIUS (APPLESEED)
step2.body: We map your zone of genius: what you actually do when you're at your best, who you're naturally built to serve, and the archetypal roles you play. This becomes your Genius Map — the compass for everything that follows.

step3.title: FORGE YOUR EXCALIBUR SENTENCE
step3.body: Together we craft a one-sentence unique genius offer that names your ideal person, their real, felt problem, the role you play, and the tangible shift you help create. Most people feel a mix of relief and "oh shit, that's actually it."

step4.title: DESIGN & TEST YOUR MVGB
step4.body: From that sentence, we design your Minimally Viable Genius Business: clear offer and outcome, container, price point, and simple, human outreach. Then you test it in real conversations, and we refine based on what lands, what doesn't, and what your body says yes to.

forWhom.for1: Founders, ex-founders, and creative leaders who know they're here to change something real, not just make decent money.
forWhom.for2: People whose old professional identity has cracked, and pretending it still works feels like self-betrayal.
forWhom.for3: Those willing to tell the truth about money, fear, and desire — and then do focused work from there.
forWhom.for4: People ready to commit to one primary lane (for now) and give it a genuine chance.
forWhom.notFor1: Anyone looking for "10k in 10 days" hacks or copy-paste funnels.
forWhom.notFor2: People who want AI and automation to do the work instead of real conversations.
forWhom.notFor3: Folks unwilling to be seen more deeply than their current bio or brand.
forWhom.notFor4: Anyone who wants a guarantee without taking any risk or responsibility.

howWeWork.heading: HOW WE WORK TOGETHER
howWeWork.intro: We work in a focused, time-bound container (for example, 6–10 weeks), using:
howWeWork.item1: – Deep 1:1 sessions (Zoom or in-person when possible)
howWeWork.item2: – Voice / text between sessions for integration and tweaks
howWeWork.item3: – Shared living documents (your Genius Map, Excalibur sentence, MVGB spec)
howWeWork.beforeAfter: I don't sell endless months of "support." We aim for a clear before/after: you enter in limbo, you leave with one working path.
howWeWork.value1: – We agree on a base fee for the container (discussed live).
howWeWork.value2: – Plus a small share of revenue from your new MVGB only,
howWeWork.value3: – Capped at a fixed amount, so it stays fair and non-extractive.
howWeWork.valueCloser: I win when your genius starts feeding you. That's the point.

about.heading: WHO'S HOLDING THIS WORK
about.bio1: I'm Aleksandr — a systems architect, venture builder, and teacher of integral evolution.
about.bio2: My life's work is helping people and projects move from myth-level vision to real-world structure. I've built and advised ventures at the intersection of tech, consciousness, and new systems, and helped founders name their true lane and design businesses around it.
about.bio3: This offer — Destiny: Your Unique Genius Business — is my own MVGB. It's how my genius plugs straight into yours.

finalCta.heading: READY TO STOP HOVERING BETWEEN WORLDS?
finalCta.p1: If you feel the gap between who you are and how you make a living getting more painful, that's not a bug — it's a summons.
finalCta.p2: This call is not a sales trap. It's a space to look honestly at where you are, name what's really trying to be born through you, and see whether this container is the right forge.
finalCta.subtext: One conversation. Full honesty. No pressure. If it's not the right time or fit, we'll both say so.

foundersShowcase.heroSubtitle: Each person went through the Unique Business Canvas process. Their myth was discovered. Their business was designed around who they already are.
foundersShowcase.lockedConsentBefore: Full canvas will be visible once
foundersShowcase.lockedMythIllustration: The myth above is shown for illustration.
foundersShowcase.thesisQuote: "The myth IS the marketing. Operational fact, not theory."
foundersShowcase.ctaSubtitle: One session. Your myth discovered. Your canvas complete. The business you were always meant to build — revealed.

monetization.heroEyebrow: Built in the open · paid in the open
monetization.heroSubBefore: The whole model: what stays free, what is paid for, and why it grows
monetization.heroBody: The seed is free on purpose: a short profile that shows you what you are naturally great at, given away so it can spread. Nobody pays for the seed. The money comes from what grows around it, and every form of it is designed so the platform stays small while the people using it grow.
monetization.seedBody: A two-minute talent profile, free for anyone. It is the front door, not a sample held back to upsell. The more people who hold a clear picture of what they uniquely bring, the better the whole thing works, so the front door stays open and free.
monetization.waysEyebrow: Three ways it is paid for
monetization.way1Title: People and groups pay to use it
monetization.way1Desc: A person can go deeper for a small fee, then book a session, then get help building. A community can pay a regular fee to run the whole thing for its members, under its own name. And anyone can run their own copy and send back a small share once they are truly earning from it.
monetization.way2Title: We share in what it helps build
monetization.way2Desc: Where the platform is genuinely part of building a venture, it keeps a small, lasting share. We only earn when you do. This is invitation-based and only where we are truly in the loop, never a tax on every introduction.
monetization.way3Desc: In time, schools and programs can be certified to teach the method themselves, the way a coaching or yoga certification works.
monetization.orderBody: These turn on in sequence, not all at once. People first, you can use it today. Communities next, running it for their own members. Sharing in the ventures it helps build comes later, and only where we are genuinely part of the building. Licensing others to teach it comes last. Each step proves and funds the next.
monetization.principleBodyBefore: Three commitments hold it together. We stay small while the thing underneath grows. The code is open-source and forkable, meant to be owned by the people who use it, not locked behind a wall. And a fair share of what the network earns funds a shared commons, not a private fortune. The one number all of it serves is simple:
monetization.principleBodyInk: how many people find their people and start building together
monetization.closeQuote: A business that earns by helping people succeed, and takes a fair slice for making it happen.
monetization.footerTagline: Built in the open. Owned by the people who use it.

onePager.heroTaglineBefore: An operating system for a civilization that coordinates around
onePager.heroBody: Planetary OS helps people find their unique contribution, find the right people to build with, and turn that into real ventures. It does the same thing at every scale: a person, a team, a community, ecosystems, evolution-oriented communities, network states, and land-based projects. The entire system runs on one core move: making a person's differentiated value legible enough that the right collaborations, ventures, and opportunities can form around it.
onePager.heroSoftCta: Try it free in two minutes
onePager.shiftPara1: Industrial civilization coordinated people by standardizing them: roles, credentials, replaceability. The world increasingly rewards the opposite, the differentiated way each person thinks, creates, and contributes. But that value stays trapped, often illegible even to the person who holds it, so it never gets coordinated. Planetary OS is the infrastructure that makes it legible.
onePager.shiftPara2: Most communities are still directories of high-agency people, not coordination systems. They gather impressive people, but they do not reliably make the right people find and build with each other. Planetary OS turns a community's latent talent into coordination throughput by making each member's unique leverage precise enough to match, route, and activate.
onePager.kernelPara1: At the center is one atomic operation: turn a person's differentiated nature into a clear, usable profile of what they uniquely think, create, and contribute, in about fifteen minutes. Just as a computer's kernel manages memory and processes so applications can run, this kernel manages legible human difference so coordination can run. Everything else is built on top of it.
onePager.kernelPara2Before: For communities, the first expression is
onePager.kernelPara2After: : precision purpose discovery, precision mission discovery, and precision resource mapping. The question is not only what someone is good at, but what role they are naturally here to play inside a living system.
onePager.gameplayIntro: You move through it like a game. Each step stands on its own, and each unlocks the next.

gameplay.step1Desc: name what you are uniquely great at.
gameplay.step3Desc: map what you already have to work with.
gameplay.step4Desc: meet the people you actually compound with.
gameplay.step5Desc: surface who you will truly resonate with, so matches go deep, not wide.
gameplay.step6Desc: turn aligned people into something built.

onePager.gameplayHolonic: Each module is whole on its own and fits a coherent larger whole. That is what holonic means: standalone and part of the pattern at once.
onePager.metricPara1Before: The whole system exists to move one number:
onePager.metricPara1After: , the share of members who actually start building together. The hidden engine beneath every community's growth and output, and almost nobody measures it.
onePager.metricPara2: Secondary metrics follow from that one: collaborations formed, ventures formed, projects launched, introductions converted, member retention through meaningful participation, and member GDP.
onePager.growsPara: The same pattern runs at every scale, and it was proven on its own founder first, then a small founder cohort, before any network. The first holon tests every piece before the network inherits it. From one person, to a community, to an ecosystem, a network state, a land-based project.
onePager.touchPara: A person enters free, in about fifteen minutes. A community, ecosystem, or network runs it as the coordination layer beneath its membership, skinned to its own brand. It is open-source and forkable, owned by the people who use it.
onePager.secondaryDemo: See a live demo of the platform
onePager.stakeQuote: A civilization that organizes around who people actually are, instead of flattening them into standardized roles. Make differentiated human value legible, and everything else, the matching, the ventures, the ecosystems and network states, follows.
onePager.footerTagline: Built in the open. Owned by the people who use it.

founderMarketFit.heroH1Line2: You just can't see it yet.
founderMarketFit.heroSub: The pattern you keep seeing. The problem you can't stop working on. That's not a detour — that's the business.
founderMarketFit.painItem1Before: "I just need to figure out the right thing to
founderMarketFit.painItem3: "I'm so much more capable than my results show."
founderMarketFit.painItem4: "Something fundamental is off but I can't see what."
founderMarketFit.painItem5: "I feel like I'm drilling hoping I'm almost through the wall."
founderMarketFit.painReframeBefore: This isn't a strategy problem. It's not a motivation problem. It's a
founderMarketFit.painReframeAfter: problem. The business you're looking for is already inside the thing you can't stop doing. The pattern you keep seeing, the problem you keep circling — that's not scattered energy. That's signal.
founderMarketFit.painReframeP2: You just need someone who can see the pattern from outside the loop.
founderMarketFit.mythHeading: What the startup world gets wrong
founderMarketFit.mythP1: Everyone tells you to find product-market fit through iteration. Test. Pivot. Talk to customers. Try keys in locks until one fits.
founderMarketFit.mythP2: But what if the key is already inside you?
founderMarketFit.mythP3After: is the match between who you are at your core and what you build. When it's off: endless pivots, mediocre traction, burnout. When it's on: the venture compounds because it's built on who you actually are.
founderMarketFit.mythP4Before: Most founders skip this step. They jump to "what should I build?" before answering
founderMarketFit.mythP4Strong: who am I when I'm at my brightest?
founderMarketFit.mythP5: No amount of execution excellence fixes an inverted sequence.
founderMarketFit.revealAfter1: The structural match between who you are and what you build. Without it, every venture feels like pushing uphill. The breakthrough stays "right around the corner" — and the corner keeps moving.
founderMarketFit.revealAfter2Before: With it — unfair advantage. The thing that makes the hard parts feel like
founderMarketFit.compassionP1Before: I believe every founder has one venture that's structurally theirs. Most never find it — not because they're not good enough, but because
founderMarketFit.compassionP1Strong: Founder-Market Fit is invisible from the inside.
founderMarketFit.compassionP2Before: You can't read the label from inside the bottle. It's not about working harder, networking more, or finding the right co-founder. It's about seeing the one thing you can't see alone:
founderMarketFit.compassionP2Strong: where your genius meets the market.
founderMarketFit.compassionP3: Once someone maps it for you, it becomes obvious. The kind of obvious that makes you wonder how you missed it.
founderMarketFit.filterYes1: You're a founder or builder who's been in transition too long
founderMarketFit.filterYes2: You sense the gap between your potential and your traction
founderMarketFit.filterYes3: You want structural clarity, not motivational pep talks
founderMarketFit.filterYes4: You've done inner work and want it to connect to outer results
founderMarketFit.filterNoHeading: This is NOT for you if:
founderMarketFit.filterNo1: You want someone to hand you a business plan
founderMarketFit.filterNo2: You're not ready to look honestly at who you are
founderMarketFit.methodStep1Desc: We map your unique gift: the patterns, strengths, and edges that make you irreplaceable.
founderMarketFit.methodStep2DescBefore: We cross-reference with market reality: where does your gift meet a need that's urgent
founderMarketFit.methodStep3Desc: We design your first moves: what to build, who it's for, and your concrete next steps.
founderMarketFit.deliverable1After: — the one sentence that names your alignment
founderMarketFit.deliverable2After: — the shape of the business that makes structural sense for you
founderMarketFit.deliverable3After: — concrete steps for this week, not someday
founderMarketFit.deliverable4After: — so you can revisit the insights
founderMarketFit.methodFootnote: No pitch. No upsell. Just 90 minutes of someone seeing what you can't see from inside the loop.
founderMarketFit.testimonial1Before: "This is a miracle of miracles. Other tools come at this half-baked and shallow; they've got no depth. Your approach, though —
founderMarketFit.testimonial1Strong: a tool that just plain works.
founderMarketFit.testimonial2Before: "Truly profound. I am so inspired to lean into my talents and
founderMarketFit.testimonial3Before: "I got into my zone of genius and
founderMarketFit.testimonial3Strong: launched my blockchain wellness education project.
founderMarketFit.testimonial4Before: "Getting unstuck. This is very valuable. Inspires & informs
founderMarketFit.objection1Q: "What if I already have an idea?"
founderMarketFit.objection1ABefore: Then we stress-test it against your genius map. You'll know in 90 minutes if it's
founderMarketFit.objection2Q: "What if I'm not ready to commit?"
founderMarketFit.objection2A: This isn't a commitment to a venture. It's 90 minutes of clarity. You decide what to do with it after.
founderMarketFit.objection3A: Coaching is ongoing. This is a one-time diagnostic — a map, not a subscription.
founderMarketFit.bookUrgency: Every month without Founder-Market Fit is a month of compounding in the wrong direction.
